name: @open-cowork/desktop
description: Desktop workspace for OpenCode sessions, agents, tools, skills, and workflows
author: Joe Broadhead

scripts.deps:build: corepack pnpm tokens:build && corepack pnpm ui:build
scripts.test:e2e: corepack pnpm --dir ../.. build:shared && corepack pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @open-cowork/runtime-host build && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm build:electron && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-smoke-tests.mjs --pattern "tests/*.smoke.test.ts" --timeout=120000 --retries=1
scripts.test:e2e:packaged: node ../../scripts/require-packaged-executable.mjs && corepack pnpm --dir ../.. build:shared && corepack pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @open-cowork/runtime-host build && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-smoke-tests.mjs --pattern "tests/*.packaged.test.ts" --timeout=240000 --retries=1
scripts.test:e2e:packaged:optional: corepack pnpm --dir ../.. build:shared && corepack pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @open-cowork/runtime-host build && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-smoke-tests.mjs --pattern "tests/*.packaged.test.ts" --timeout=240000 --retries=1
scripts.test:e2e:evals: corepack pnpm --dir ../.. build:shared && corepack pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @open-cowork/runtime-host build && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm build:electron && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-smoke-tests.mjs --pattern "tests/*.eval.test.ts" --timeout=180000 --retries=1
scripts.screenshots: corepack pnpm --dir ../.. build:shared && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm build:electron && node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types tests/screenshots.ts
